title: Nothing major to complain about in Rebuild
display_title: Nothing major to complain about in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Nothing major to complain about in Rebuild? [Spoilers]             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Aug 22, 2009 10:49 pm (Warning: This user has only seen the camrip, and not the translations. Some things may be incorrect.) Am I the only one that wasn't unhappy with the way Rebuild has turned out? Everywhere I looked, all I saw was whining about the changes, and people saying it was nowhere near as good as the series. Before the damn camrip of 2.0 even came out there was a 20+-page thread about Asuka getting her name changed... People where dismissing Eva-01's new paint job as Day-Glo, Eva-02 was compared to the redesign in EoE. (I still say the latter wasn't all that noticeable; the Eva's were never all that pretty anyway.) Next we have 2.0, especially the ending... Dear God... I haven't seen so many people argue and complain over unimportant crap since someone restarted the chicken and egg debate at my high school... If people weren't whining about Eva-01 running on a ramp, they were whining about Asuka not getting to pilot Unit 02, or the fact that someone in SEELE had the foresight not to let one organization keep 4 Super-powerful Mecha's in one building. (Course, I dunno what that treaty actually means, cause no one's translated it yet...) Then people were complaining about the Beast Mode in Eva-02. Again, I dunno the justifications in the movie. Somebody mentioned that the restraining whatchamacallits that exploded out of its back were a biological impossibility, 'cause there was meat there. Ignoring the fact that the laws of physic were pretty much slaughtered from the start of the franchise, have we forgotten the entry plug drilling through the Eva's spine? Lastly, we have the ending. Oy vey... 1. Is the mouth thing all that important? Would you have preferred a featureless shadow, like the original series? 2. Zeruel got the human body to mirror mGNR. 3. Leonidas: Shinji! DID NOT! RIP OFF! GURREN LAGANN! 4.The ending was not a list of new plot points, bub. You know who I'm talking to... Then there's the shipping, but I'm not trying to start a war here. Anyone else have no real complaints about the movies?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:02 pm No, I don't think you're alone. I'd think at least part of it is that there's just a lot more to talk about when you're arguing/criticizing/debating stuff than there usually is when you're talking about how much you like something, so I'd imagine there's just a natural tendency for there to be more visible focus on negativity. (Though of course I can't speak for everyone and I could be completely wrong on that.) Personally I'm loving Rebuild so far. I wouldn't have minded seeing more deviations from the original in 1.0, but it still works as a setup/introduction. I like 2.0's additions and changes, even though as an Asuka fan I have reason to be a bit worried about the outcome :P

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:05 pm Ditto Essel. I cant wait for Q and ? to come out.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:06 pm A few things bugged me here and there, but especially since there have been people translating things with 2.0, overall I felt the film was excellent. My nitpicks are minor things, for the most part I really enjoyed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:15 pm 1.0 was basically the dark, quirky opening of the original series done AWESOME STYLE. I loved it. 2.0 was basically the action-packed nitro-boosting battle saga of the next third of the series, keeping the feel of the darkness and again, doing it AWESOME STYLE. Still loving it. As long as 3.0 gets the heavy psychological feel in (note the lack of battles in the preview: it's a good sign) and Final is really and truly a new direction, and it's done AWESOME STYLE, I will love it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:29 pm Not to back seat mod, but isn't there already a thread where you can say how you feel about Rebuild? http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6969

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:33 pm Legendary: Does this mean you finally watched 1.0 and 2.0? Anyway, this is one of those topics that are diverging at a specific question, so it seems okay to me.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Aug 22, 2009 11:35 pm The Goose wrote: Not to back seat mod, but isn't there already a thread where you can say how you feel about Rebuild? http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6969

[]: Re: Am I the only one...(spoilers, rant thread.)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Aug 23, 2009 2:18 am CyberXIII wrote: the Eva's were never all that pretty anyway

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Aug 23, 2009 3:03 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Legendary: Does this mean you finally watched 1.0 and 2.0?

[]: Re: Am I the only one...(spoilers, rant thread.)             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 23, 2009 8:30 am SaltyJoe wrote: CyberXIII wrote: the Eva's were never all that pretty anyway

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Sun Aug 23, 2009 8:48 am Mmh, I don't feel that way at all. I found quite a lot of people on this board who shared my positive opinion on Rebuild, sure there was a lot of whining, but that basically has to stand out somewhat since I can't see "appreciations threads" - where people just praise certain aspects of the movies - would work on here. (and that's a good thing, actually)

[]:             Quote Post by NGERA » Sun Aug 23, 2009 10:04 am I like rebuild. I liked the animation, the character progression (and of course the general story).

[]: Re: Am I the only one...(spoilers, rant thread.)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Aug 23, 2009 12:04 pm CyberXIII wrote: 3. What fansub?

[]: Re: Am I the only one...(spoilers, rant thread.)             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Aug 23, 2009 12:15 pm You are (not) alone, man. Take comfort in remembering that when NGE originally came out, Director Anno received Death Threats and now that very NGE is saluted as a masterpiece by geeks (almost) everywhere... Let's not even go into the EoE deal... SaltyJoe wrote: That... that hurt. At least you could have inserted an IMO there.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Sun Aug 23, 2009 12:55 pm I'm very pleased with the movies, but I feel they will work better when all 4 are viewed as one cohesive movie because of the way things are split up (with the introductory stuff in 1.0, all the action 2.0, and most likely all the psychological stuff in 3.0 and 4.0.) kinda like kill bill (all action in the 1st part and all story/dialogue in the 2nd).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 23, 2009 3:04 pm I don't have a single issue with the movies whatsoever. So far, they're perfect. I'll judge any possible flaws they might have after seeing the whole thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:40 am CyberXIII you can't expect people not to hate Rebuild for little details when you love Eva for it's own little details, 2.0 was a turn off to me and made 1.0 look like "what was the point?" but Im not complaining, still, there are people who want to complaint and they' have the right to complaint because not everyone have to love rebuild like you do and not all the threads have to be "Im loving rebuild so far!", we're Evageeks in the good and in the bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:09 am I have 0 complaints for rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon Aug 24, 2009 1:26 pm i'm loving rebuild so far the nitpicks (in my case, at least) are just for the sake of discussion (ok, ok, i found Rei!zeruel immensely funny, but i can live with that).
